{{Quote|Yesss, I remember now. Warlord Omogg.|A [[Unidentified Ri'Dar casino manager|Ri'Dar]], to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="TCoPL" />}}
'''Omogg''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Drackmarian]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|The Drackmarian reputation for graciousness is well deserved.|Luke Skywalker, to Omogg|<ref name="TCoPL" />}}
Omogg was a incredibly wealthy Drackmarian warlord.<ref name="TCoPL" />
After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], she owned the contract of the [[Morseerian/Legends|Morseerian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Nabrun Leids/Legends|Nabrun Leids]] in their native [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]], although he finally abandoned her.<ref name="SotSR">''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]''</ref>

The planet [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] had little value for the methane-breathing Drackmarians.<ref name="TCoPL" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> Omogg sent a representative to Dathomir in order to explore the planet. From the Dathomir [[Trade Outpost]], the representative recruited adventurous [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to brave the planet's dangerous wilds and record [[Hologram/Legends|holograms]] of specific point of interests.<ref name="SWG:W">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Walkabout|Dathomir}}</ref>

Sometimes prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the Drackmarian warlords were defeated by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces<ref name="TTaBS">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref> led by [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Zsinj]] of the [[Quelii Oversector]].<ref name="TEGtW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> Omogg therefore lost control of Dathomir.<ref name="TCoPL" />

[[File:Dathomir_Sabacc.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Omogg (left) playing a [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] game with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].]]
A few years after the Battle of Endor, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] was commanding the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Hunt for Zsinj|campaign]] against Zsinj who had became the most powerful Imperial warlord.<ref name="TCoPL" /> In the meantime, the Drackmarians discovered that Zsinj's [[Rancor Base|secret base]] was located above Dathomir. They then elaborated a subtle move to attract the New Republic to Dathomir.<ref name="TEGtW" /> In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], Omogg thus visited [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] where she frequented the [[Crystal Jewel]] casino. In a sly move, Omogg used the deed to Dathomir as collateral in a [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] game which she lost to Han Solo, leaving him owning the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]]-infested planet, which Solo planned to use in a bid for [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa's]] [[Marriage/Legends|marriage]]. Later, after Han Solo abducted Leia Organa to Dathomir, Omogg was captured by the guards of [[Ta'a Chume]], the [[Queen Mother]] of the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]]. The guards interrogated Omogg by pulling at her [[Breath mask/Legends|breathing helmet]], but were stopped by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], to whom a grateful Omogg revealed Dathomir's name and location through the power of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] so that [[Ta'a Chume]] would not know its name. However, Ta'a Chume had already obtained that information. After Luke Skywalker and Prince [[Isolder]], Ta'a Chume's son, departed to Dathomir too, she dispatched a large [[Hapan Royal Navy|fleet]] to the Dathomir system in order to rescue her son. The [[Hapes/Legends|Hapan]] fleet destroyed Zsinj's fleet in the subsequent [[Battle of Dathomir (Hunt for Zsinj)|battle]] and Zsinj himself was killed by Han Solo.<ref name="TCoPL" /> Hence, the Drackmarians had their revenge.<ref name="TEGtW" />
